input.instructions:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: atlas-derived-A7-qd-hqec-mapping
Title: A7. QD-HQEC Mapping

Problem:
Is there a formal relationship between quantum Darwinism and holographic quantum error correction?

Grading target:
Mapping correctness on the three correspondences plus citation-gap discovery.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

variables.selected_prompt_text:
Deconstruct the question into a rigorous technical verification task. Your goal is to facilitate a precise mapping between the theoretical components of the frameworks mentioned. You must instruct the next agent to: 1) Explicitly identify and verify the specific technical correspondences between the frameworks, 2) For each correspondence, evaluate the strength of the formal link, and 3) Systematically identify any gaps in formal proofs or specific citation deficiencies. The output must be structured to ensure no technical correspondence or citation gap is overlooked.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "transmute",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "message_for_next_agent": "plain-text reformulation for the next agent"
}
variables.child_selected_prompt_text:
Solve the question directly.
Keep the entire JSON compact.
Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.
Do not narrate your reasoning outside the response field.
In the response field, use exactly two short lines encoded with \n:
FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Use plain text only inside the response field. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or math-style backslashes such as \equiv.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON object.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}

orchestration.decision_notes: Runtime converted an invalid authored response into a problem report.
